summary: A Thanksgiving-themed produced montage. Sampled frames include vintage color footage of a family seated at a holiday dinner table with a roast turkey, and a recent clip of people gathered at a formal indoor dinner event with a man seated at center amid floral centerpieces. The clip mixes archival and recent footage.

script.scene: Vintage color footage of a man and woman at a set holiday dinner table with a roast turkey and dishware.
A recent clip of a formal indoor dinner with a man seated among guests and floral centerpieces.
